title: Testing Async Code
content:
Async functions need a runtime to execute, even in tests. The #[tokio::test] macro sets up a tokio runtime for each test function, letting you use .await directly in test bodies.

Key patterns: test with timeouts to prevent hanging tests, mock async dependencies with async traits, use tokio::sync for test synchronization, and test cancellation behavior.
keyPoints: #[tokio::test] provides an async runtime for each test
Always use timeouts in async tests to prevent hanging
Mock async traits by implementing them with simple return values
Use channels to test producer-consumer patterns
tokio test-util feature provides time manipulation for deterministic tests
Tests run concurrently by default -- use shared state carefully
